description:
Jira: TBD
Distilled from approved design conversation (2026-07-02/03). Spec dir: .spec/
Design mockup: https://claude.ai/code/artifact/e21fe2c1-642b-4a91-a6e3-ee835f9f7414
Worktree: /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-spec-review-redesign
Branch: specled_-7md/spec-review-redesign

comments.text:
Distill complete.
Specs: 1 subject amended (specled.spec_review — 7 requirements added, 3 refined, 9 scenarios added/rewritten)
Decisions: 1 (specled.decision.spec_review_change_scoped_master_detail, change_type: refines)
Tasks: 3 stages (specled_-7md.1 → .2 → .3, dep-chained)
Spec dir: .spec/
Spec commit: 125b8dc (branch specled_-7md/spec-review-redesign)
Design mockup: https://claude.ai/code/artifact/e21fe2c1-642b-4a91-a6e3-ee835f9f7414
Next step: /implement specled_-7md.1 (or /orchestrate-epic specled_-7md)

Merge gates after specled_-7md.1 close: compile clean, 904 tests / 0 failures, format clean, deps.unlock clean.

mix spec.check: status=fail errors=0 warnings=6 — all 6 are verification_target_missing_reference on lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex for S2/S3 requirements (change_scoped_overview, coverage_pivot_touched_first, findings_digest_dedup, repo_state_health_pane, review_queue_navigation, theme_tokens). Both the verifier and auditor on .1 independently confirmed these predate this merge (present at base ref 125b8dc) and are out of scope for S1 — html.ex is untouched by this stage. This is the expected interim state for a 3-stage epic whose specs were authored upfront in /distill; spec.check will not reach green until S2/S3 wire up html.ex. Not treating this as an integration regression. Continuing to specled_-7md.2.

Merge gates after specled_-7md.2 close: compile clean, 918 tests / 0 failures, format clean, deps.unlock clean.

mix spec.check: status=fail errors=0 warnings=1 — sole remaining warning is verification_target_missing_reference on lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex for specled.spec_review.coverage_pivot_touched_first, explicitly S3's scope (its stub was correctly split to execute:false). Both verifier and auditor on .2 independently confirmed this. Not a regression.

specled_-7md.3 is now unblocked (final stage). Pausing here per user request before spawning its implementer.

Scope expansion: added specled_-7md.4 (spec-governance repair) to resolve 3 pre-existing branch-guard defects surfaced by specled_-7md.3's implementer once the last validate-stage warning cleared:
1. append_only/must_downgraded on degraded_leg_state (existing ADR doesn't formally authorize it per the guard's requirements — needs investigation + ADR amendment or rewording)
2. branch_guard_unmapped_change on findings_delta.ex (never registered in the subject's surface: list — .1's scope excluded this edit)
3. overlap/duplicate_covers on findings_delta (two scenarios cover the same requirement id — distill-time authoring gap)
specled_-7md.4 blocks specled_-7md.3. specled_-7md.3's own commit is complete and unaffected; it will be rebased and re-verified once .4 lands.

Merge gates after specled_-7md.4 close: compile clean, 918 tests / 0 failures, format clean, deps.unlock clean.

mix spec.check back to exactly 1 warning (coverage_pivot_touched_first — specled_-7md.3's job, as expected; matches state after .2). All 3 branch-guard defects .4 targeted are confirmed cleared (verified independently by both cold verifier and auditor, including live reproduction of the classifier logic and the .3+.4 integration overlay).

Rebasing specled_-7md.3's stage branch onto the new epic HEAD next.

Merge gates after specled_-7md.3 close: compile clean, 930 tests / 0 failures, format clean, deps.unlock clean.

mix spec.check: status=pass errors=0 warnings=0, branch findings=0 — fully clean for the first time in this epic. All 4 children closed (.1, .2, .3, .4 — .4 was a scope-expansion ticket carved mid-epic to fix pre-existing spec-governance defects .3's own validate-stage fix unmasked). Proceeding to deliver.

ORCHESTRATED
Children closed: 4 (.1, .2, .3, .4 — .4 was a scope-expansion ticket carved mid-epic)
BOUNCEs encountered: 1 (.3: AUDIT: BOUNCE -> implementer, iteration 1 delivered only 1 of 6 deliverable parts; iteration 2 addressed all gaps and passed verify+audit cleanly)
User escalations: 0 formal ESCALATED events. One process note: the orchestrator fast-forward-merged .3's iteration-1 commit before running verify/audit (a sequencing error), caught before closing the ticket; corrected by running verify+audit after the fact rather than rolling back, since the merge was a reversible no-op fast-forward with nothing built on top.
Final state: mix spec.check fully clean (status=pass, 0 errors, 0 warnings, branch findings=0) for the first time in the epic. 930 tests, 0 failures. All merge gates green.

Post-orchestration UX polish pass (commit 14b5818), driven by an independent fable-model fresh-eyes review of the rebuilt spec.review artifact plus two verification passes (before/after fix, both via live playwright interaction, not just source reading):

1. Word-level (not character-level) inline wording diff for modified requirements
2. Dark-mode Prism token background fix (operators/entities/urls no longer show as visible gray boxes)
3. Sticky pivot tab bar + sticky per-file diff headers + correctly-pinned file-tree drawer handle — root cause was .subject's overflow:hidden silently breaking position:sticky for every descendant
4. Removed a dead #subjects link + stale v1 single-scroll copy on the Outside-the-spec-system pane
5. Reconciled 4 previously-inconsistent spec-edit count presentations (split combined requirements+scenarios into labeled clauses)
6. Spec health headline no longer reads "Out of sync ⚠" for advisory-only (info-severity) findings — added a neutral "Cannot fully verify" state matching the degraded-≠-warning design principle
7. Coverage pivot requirement statements truncated to one line with hover tooltip (full text stays on Spec tab)
8-9. Two additional dark-mode contrast bugs found during verification (hardcoded light-palette backgrounds on requirement-new/modified/removed/uncovered cards and sync-check-degraded rows) and one low-contrast badge, all fixed with proper theme tokens

All merge gates green: compile clean, 930 tests / 0 failures (one confirmed pre-existing flake on retry, logged on specled_-f98), format clean, deps clean, mix spec.check fully clean.

Not tracked as a separate ticket per user's explicit "quick fix in epic worktree" delivery choice — committed directly on the epic branch.

Merged and pushed directly to main (14b5818), per user's explicit instruction and this repo's established direct-push workflow (no PR). origin/main confirmed at ce080c1..14b5818, fast-forward, no conflicts. Re-ran compile + full test suite (930/930) on main post-merge before pushing.

Epic worktree/branch left in place. Epic ticket not closed — leaving that to a deliberate /deliver pass if wanted.

title: spec.review v2: change-scoped master–detail layout
